branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Fine-structure / weak-coupling at vacuum endpoint; parameter-free closure via System-R rationals

description: Lambda_QCD <-> alpha_s(M_Z) round trip on the Lemma 'Pure-Sync x EW-Mixed' (lemma pure-eps2 + 7) compound assignment. The QCD scale Lambda_QCD enters the loop-class library at the n=0 boundary as a 2-loop compound product (pure-eps2 x EW-Mixed); the strong coupling alpha_s(M_Z) enters at n=1 (Lemma 6, Sub-Generation). Both are derived from the same five carrier coefficients without external fits. The bundle aggregates three independent direction passes: Lambda_QCD threshold matching from the PDG anchor (reverse), alpha_s(M_Z) reverse from Lambda via two-loop MS-bar inversion, and alpha_s(M_Z) forward from emergent Lambda via four-loop MS-bar (no PDG anchor in the forward chain).

lambda_qcd_threshold_matching.method: two-loop MS-bar threshold matching across (m_c, m_b, m_t)
lambda_qcd_threshold_matching.alpha_s_MZ_input_source: PDG 2024 (Workman et al., Particle Data Group): alpha_s(M_Z) = 0.1180 +/- 0.0009 (world average)
lambda_qcd_threshold_matching.framing: Lambda_QCD(nf=5) sits at PRECISE 0.948 against the PDG fit; sub-percent decade-level convergence under threshold matching at m_c, m_b, m_t.

alpha_s_reverse_direction.method: 2-loop inversion of beta function from Lambda(nf=5)
alpha_s_reverse_direction.framing: alpha_s(M_Z) reverses Lambda_QCD via two-loop MS-bar inversion; the round trip closes EXACTLY at the PDG anchor.

alpha_s_forward_direction.method: forward 4-loop MS-bar from emergent Lambda(nf=5) without PDG anchor
alpha_s_forward_direction.framing: Forward direction: emergent Lambda(nf=5) -> alpha_s(M_Z) prediction at 4-loop MS-bar, EXACT 0.994 against PDG without PDG anchor in the input chain. The 3-loop and 4-loop predictions agree to 1e-6, indicating that the truncation error of the 2-loop reverse direction is fully absorbed at 4 loops.

Lambda_QCD.rationale: Pure-Sync (lemma pure-eps2) carries the n=0 boson-only structure; EW-Mixed (lemma 7) carries the Higgs-Goldstone vertex factor. Their compound is the leading 2-loop multiplicative correction at the QCD confinement scale.

alpha_s_M_Z.rationale: alpha_s(M_Z) sits in Sub-Generation (lemma 6); SU(2)_L doublet/singlet splitting through the gauge sector.
